name: QA 1264
description:
PCP QA Test No. 1286

Exercise the BPF PMDA netproc hits module - install, remove and values.



Copyright (c) 2024 Red Hat.



**To reproduce this test, please run:**

    build/ci/ci-run.py fedora40-container reproduce
